chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-843 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.8102/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3961/2024 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3962/2024 (C/A) 5. For hearing of main case 12.09.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for respondents No.12 to 15 Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with all pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
